notes: D3D11 using DXVK. Sometimes results in a little stutter, at least in the mechanical drive, the first time shader cache needs to generated, which could be solved by having up to date shader cache. Sometimes stutter won't go until the restart which may be issue on my side. Otherwise no issues whatsoever completing the game.
